description: This pipeline applies a custom thresholding method to input data, and then performs a morphological operation on the resulting greyscale images, allowing for various operations such as erosion, dilation, and gradient calculation, with the ability to handle multi-channel and higher-dimensional data.

ddbf9d52-40cf-4264-93a2-ace55f45789d.name: ij1-morph-operation2d
ddbf9d52-40cf-4264-93a2-ace55f45789d.description:
Applies a morphological operation to greyscale images. Following operations are included: Erosion, Dilation, Opening, Closing, White Top Hat, Black Top Hat, Gradient, Laplacian, Internal Gradient, and External Gradient. More information (including examples) can be found at https://imagej.net/MorphoLibJ.html
If a multi-channel image is provided, the operation is applied to each channel. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

05a038ae-3064-4b7a-9f71-063f0391da80.name: ij1-threshold-expression2d-8u
05a038ae-3064-4b7a-9f71-063f0391da80.description:
Allows to implement a custom thresholding method via expressions. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.
